subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath been received. Thou hadst written that, praise be unto God, the beloved of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما وصول یافت مرقوم فرموده بودید که الحمد لله احباء الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @education of children; moral education
